# kopsutils Provider

Exposes kОps name-truncation helpers (LimitedLengthName, cluster HashString), OCI image digest resolution, and OIDC service-account JWKS generation as data sources for use in HCL.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    kopsutils = {
      source = "e2b-dev/kopsutils"
    }
  }
}

# The provider takes no configuration; its data sources are pure computations
# (except kopsutils_oci_reference, which queries container registries).
provider "kopsutils" {}
```
